text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Displeased by Operation Oversight, Taiki Shuttle
and some other students go to talk to Ms.
Kashimoto in person.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Kashimoto offers a wager—she will reinstate
the Unity Cup, but if her own team wins, then the
students must accept her management system.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team she gathers is led by Bitter Glasse and
Little Cocon and consists of elite racers who
agree with her methods.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush about finding members for my team. The
fate of Tracen Academy is at stake!
